nameEn: Vegan Kimchi Fried Rice Meal Kit
keyIngredients: 배추 70.4%(국내산), 고춧가루 4.3% (중국산), 대파기름 2.6%(대파:국내산), 생강 1.6%(국내산), 마늘 1.5 %(국내산) , 무 1.4%(국내산), 정백당, 정제수, 고과당, 정제염(국내산), 콩기름(대두유), L-글루탐산나트륨(향미증진제)
packaging: red printed cardboard gift box with bold "Slunch KIMCHI FRIED RICE" retro lettering and cartoon mascot, containing 2 red metal stir-fried kimchi cans with pull-tab lids, 2 white round instant rice bowl containers with clear lids, and 1 small seasoning oil sachet
foodVisual: vibrant orange-red kimchi fried rice with visible kimchi pieces, green onion bits, sesame seeds, glistening with sesame oil
description: 100% plant-based, 3-min cooking, 70%+ locally sourced kimchi & rice

keyIngredients: 배추 70.4%(국내산), 고춧가루 4.3%(중국산), 대파기름 2.6%(대파:국내산), 생강 1.6%(국내산), 마늘 1.5%(국내산), 무 1.4%(국내산), 정백당, 정제수, 고과당, 정제염(국내산), 콩기름(대두유), L-글루탐산나트륨(향미증진제)

foodVisual: glossy deep red-orange stir-fried chopped kimchi, tangled fermented cabbage pieces with visible chili flakes and seasonings
description: No fish sauce, shelf-stable vegan kimchi can, Vegan certified

packaging: kraft paper cup container with red printed cardboard sleeve wrap labeled "Slunch KIMCHI PANCAKE" with retro lettering and cartoon mascot, inside the cup: a red metal kimchi can and 2 powder seasoning sachets, entire cup sealed with clear transparent vinyl shrink wrap
foodVisual: golden-brown crispy round kimchi pancake (jeon) with red kimchi pieces visible through crispy batter surface, slightly charred edges
description: Easy vegan kimchi pancake kit, 100% plant-based ingredients

packaging: orange-red rectangular printed cardboard box with "Slunch" retro lettering, food imagery of noodle soup on front

description: Vegan Korean noodle kit with kimchi & vegetable broth, boil 5 min

keyIngredients: 냉동트리플베리(해썹: 블루베리 40%, 라즈베리30%, 블랙베리 30% 24.6%, 밀가루(밀:미국산), 유기농비건버릇릭(텐마크산: 유기농 시어버터나무씨앗오일, 유기농 코코넛오일, 유기농 유채유, 정제소금, 유기농 아몬드, 아몬드분말(아몬드100%,미국산), 95%, 소맥분(미국/호주)5%, 설탕(설탕100%), 식물성크림(쉐프&파티쉐원유(인도네시아)), 황, 에테르, 콜라리진장방산에스터, 설탕, 아자
packaging: gold/beige square printed cardboard box with bold "Slunch BLUEBERRY TART" retro lettering, cartoon berry character mascot, "Slunch Factory" badge, whole tart inside clear round plastic dish
foodVisual: whole round tart with buttery golden crust, topped with glossy deep purple blueberry and red berry filling, berries visible in jam-like compote
description: Rich vegan tart without milk or butter, Korean blueberries, ready after thawing

packaging: beige/cream square printed cardboard box with bold "Slunch PEACH TART" retro lettering, cartoon peach character mascot, whole tart inside clear round plastic dish
foodVisual: whole round tart with buttery golden crust, beautifully arranged thin caramelized peach slices in concentric spiral pattern, glazed golden-orange surface
description: Premium Korean yellow peach tart, crispy vegan crust, no milk/butter

keyIngredients: 감자 78%(국내산), 밀가루(미국산, 캐나다산), 전분가공품[감자전분1(외국산: 폴란드, 독일, 프랑스 등)99.5%, 감자전분2(국내산)0.5%], 탄산수소나트륨(산도조절제, 팽창제)], 전분가공품, 프리모셰프포마스블렌딩오일, 시금치분말(중국산), 셰프모마스블렌딩오일(이탈리아 0.9%), 천연향신료(국내산), 꽃소금

foodVisual: creamy white sauce gnocchi with green spinach pieces, small potato dumplings, green peas, red bell pepper bits, mushroom pieces in a creamy sauce

keyIngredients: 가공두유(원액두유(원액두유산:미국,캐나다, 러시아 등), 식염), 유기농 비건 블록(덴마크산: 유기농 시어버터나무씨앗오일 등, 유기능 코코넛 오일, 유기능 유채유, 정제소금, 유기능 아몬드)8.8%, 밀가루(밀: 미국산), 천일염, 완두콩(벨기에산), 양파(국내산), 편마늘(국내산), 셀러리(국내산), 샌드리, 아마씨종실유(이탈리아), 이토마토(토마토(터키산)80%, 해바라기유, 마늘, 발사미크식초(무수아황산(산화방지제)), 꽃소금, 버섯, 매생이크림소스, 주정, 오레기니(?)], 천연향신료(외국산:케냐 우간다 나이지리아 등)
packaging: brown/tan sealed pouch with "Maesaengi Cream Penne" text and black banner ribbon label, meal kit format

description: Cream-style vegan penne with Korean Maesaengi seaweed base

keyIngredients: 두유[원액두유99.9%{대두고형분 10%이상, 외국산(미국, 캐나다, 러시아 등)}, 식염]51%, 백미(국내산)16%, 매생이(국내산)8.2%, 쥬키니(국내산), 양파(국내산), 과·채가공품(양송이100%, 중국산), 카무트(튀르키에산), 다진마늘(국내산), 프리모셰프혼합포마스오일(이탈리아), 흑미(국내산), 후추분태(베트남산), 가공소금, 만토바트러플향 엑스트라라버진 올리브오일 스프레이(이탈리아)0.24%

description: Premium truffle-flavored vegan risotto with Korean Maesaengi
